records.message: Try using Brave to attack twice!

Your BP is now -1 because you used Brave
last turn. That means you can’t do anything
this turn!

Using Default adds 1 BP to your reserve.
That means you can use Brave once and
still act the next turn.

You can take advantage of Brave and
Default to minimize the damage you take
and then unleash a flurry of attacks in a
single turn!

Let’s try using Send. This time we’ll send
“Attack.”
Okay, let’s try using a special move!

Notice the music is still playing after the
special move ended? Your allies’ abilities
are boosted until the music stops!
